title: erigeron breunius
intro: Erigeron breunius, also known as Robert's fleabane or daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Erigeron breunius is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
